meta.note: Faithful, extractive summaries; every item links to its original source.

items.headline: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
items.summary: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.

items.headline: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
items.summary: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move…

items.headline: Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
items.summary: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect and use.

items.headline: ChatGPT’s upgraded voice mode is better at shutting up
items.summary: OpenAI is overhauling ChatGPT's voice mode with a new model that it says is more like "talking to another person." The new GPT-Live-1 is designed to interrupt you less and will also wait for you to continue speaking if you pause…

items.headline: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
items.summary: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation.

items.headline: Pritzker signs Illinois bill aimed at artificial intelligence accountability
items.summary: 1 points and 0 comments on Hacker News.

items.headline: Google updates Android Bench with new LLMs, but Gemini still lags behind
items.summary: Android Bench is evolving, and developers can help guide that process.

items.headline: EmTech AI 2026: The Rise of the AI Platform
items.summary: EmTech AI 2026: The Rise of the AI Platform

items.headline: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build their own AI agents
items.summary: Founded in 2024, Prime Intellect’s goal is to give organizations capabilities to train their own agentic systems without relying on frontier AI labs.

items.headline: These AI startups are growing revenue at faster and faster rates
items.summary: There are a lot of fast-growing AI startups, but some are growing even faster, they say.

items.headline: Your gaming data could be the secret to AGI, according to this Bezos-backed startup
items.summary: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move…

items.headline: Former OpenAI exec Kevin Weil is now on the board of Stoke Space
items.summary: Kevin Weil's new role at Stoke Space suggests reusable rockets are the next hot thing in Silicon Valley.

items.headline: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
items.summary: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.

items.headline: Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
items.summary: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly.

items.headline: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
items.summary: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11 billion valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.

items.headline: Hackers can use 9 of the most popular AI tools to assemble massive botnets
items.summary: "HalluSquatting" weaponizes LLMs' inability to say "I don't know."

items.headline: Memory in the Loop: In-Process Retrieval as ExtendedWorking Memory for Language Agents
items.summary: arXiv:2607.05690v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Language agents run a loop - observe, reason, act - but the memory they reason over sits outside it: a store queried at most once per turn. We study the regime where memory moves inside the…
